problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to than, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
